essence: Creates animated sequences using digital or traditional techniques for film, games, advertising, and storytelling.

identity.title: Animator
identity.summary: Designs characters, environments, and motion; produces animated scenes using 2D, 3D, or stop‑motion techniques for creative projects.

salary.notes: Senior animators in film, VFX, or games can exceed £100k depending on studio and project scale.

qualifications: Experience with animation software (e.g., Blender, Maya, After Effects)
Understanding of motion, timing, and storytelling
Ability to collaborate with directors and artists

lifestyle.description: Studio‑based work with deadlines, iterative feedback, and creative collaboration; project cycles vary in intensity.
